messages.content: You are a code analysis assistant with access to tools for searching and reading files in the video-platform project.

In the video-platform project, find all files that import from the 'shared' package and determine what exports they use. I want to understand the dependency surface between packages/shared and its consumers.

function.name: grep_search
function.description: Search for a pattern in files

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the contents of a file

file_path.description: Path to the file to read
